name: cu_useragent_clienthints
comment: A table which stores Client Hints data along with other selected data that is similar to Client Hints (such as browser headers that describe the browser, like x-is-browser on WMF wikis).

columns.name: uach_name
columns.comment: Name of the user-agent client hint or other attribute similar to a Client Hint (such as x-is-browser header on WMF wikis). See https://wicg.github.io/ua-client-hints/#http-ua-hints for a list of Client Hints.

columns.name: uach_value
columns.comment: Value associated with uach_name. This may be Client Hints data or some other HTTP header data similar to Client Hints.
